ucs.title: [LLM] BITTER (T-APT-17) Equation Editor / CHM exploit chain dropping ArtraDownloader + scheduled task persistence
ucs.description: Hunts BITTER's signature initial-access chain against South Asian government/energy targets: a weaponized RTF/XLSX/CHM lure exploits CVE-2018-0798 (Equation Editor) or abuses hh.exe, then spawns a downloader (ArtraDownloader/MuuyDownloader/ZxxZ) that immediately registers a scheduled task masqueraded as a legitimate Windows/AV task for persistence.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.process_path) as process_path values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_process from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("EQNEDT32.EXE","WINWORD.EXE","EXCEL.EXE","POWERPNT.EXE","hh.exe","OUTLOOK.EXE")) (Processes.process_name IN ("schtasks.exe","cmd.exe","powershell.exe","mshta.exe","curl.exe","certutil.exe","regsvr32.exe","rundll32.exe","bitsadmin.exe")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name _time span=1h 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
| join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as taskTime values(Processes.process) as task_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="schtasks.exe" (Processes.process="*/create*" OR Processes.process="*-create*") (Processes.process="*Microsoft\\Windows*" OR Processes.process="*WindowsUpdate*" OR Processes.process="*Defender*" OR Processes.process="*OneDrive*" OR Processes.process="*\\AppData\\*" OR Processes.process="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Processes.process="*\\Public\\*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` ] 
| where taskTime >= firstTime AND taskTime <= (lastTime + 600) 
| eval bitter_score = if(match(task_cmd,"(?i)(AppData|ProgramData|Public|Temp|Roaming)\\\\.*\\.(exe|dll|scr|bat|cmd)"),3,1) 
| stats values(parent_process_name) as parents values(process_name) as children values(task_cmd) as scheduled_tasks max(bitter_score) as score by dest user 
| where score >= 2
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 7d;
let officeParents = dynamic(["eqnedt32.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","hh.exe","outlook.exe"]);
let liveOffLandChildren = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","regsvr32.exe","rundll32.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe","schtasks.exe"]);
let stage1 = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
  | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (officeParents)
  | where FileName in~ (liveOffLandChildren)
  | project DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, Stage1Time=Timestamp, Stage1Parent=InitiatingProcessFileName, Stage1Child=FileName, Stage1Cmd=ProcessCommandLine;
let stage2 = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
  | where FileName =~ "schtasks.exe"
  | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/create","-create")
  | where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(AppData|ProgramData|\\Public\\|\\Temp\\|Roaming)\\.+\.(exe|dll|scr|bat|cmd|vbs|js)"
     or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Microsoft\\Windows\\","WindowsUpdate","Defender","OneDrive","GoogleUpdate")
  | project DeviceId, Stage2Time=Timestamp, TaskCmd=ProcessCommandLine, TaskUser=AccountName;
stage1
| join kind=inner stage2 on DeviceId
| where Stage2Time between (Stage1Time .. Stage1Time + 10m)
| extend BitterChainScore = iff(Stage1Parent =~ "eqnedt32.exe", 5, 3) + iff(TaskCmd has_any ("AppData","ProgramData","Public"), 2, 0)
| project DeviceName, AccountName, Stage1Time, Stage1Parent, Stage1Child, Stage1Cmd, Stage2Time, TaskCmd, BitterChainScore
| where BitterChainScore >= 5
ucs.rationale: BITTER almost never moves off this exact chain: weaponized Office or compiled-help (.chm) lure -> Equation Editor or hh.exe child -> downloader -> schtasks.exe creating a task that masquerades as a Microsoft/Defender/OneDrive task pointing at AppData/ProgramData. Cisco Talos (May 2022 Bangladesh campaign) and QiAnXin reports confirm both ArtraDownloader and ZxxZ persist via masqueraded scheduled t

ucs.title: [LLM] BITTER ZxxZ / BitterRAT HTTP C2 beacon with hardcoded URI and victim-ID user-agent
ucs.description: Hunts BITTER's distinctive C2 fingerprint used by ZxxZ, BitterRAT and ORPCBackdoor: short repeated GET/POST beacons to newly-registered .com/.xyz/.info domains carrying a hardcoded URI path and a user-agent string that embeds the hostname/MAC as the victim ID (a documented ZxxZ trait observed by Cisco Talos and Secuinfra against South Asian government targets).
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Web.url) as urls values(Web.http_user_agent) as uas dc(Web.url) as uniq_urls dc(_time) as beacons from datamodel=Web where Web.http_method IN ("GET","POST") by Web.src Web.dest Web.site _time span=10m 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Web)` 
| eval bitter_uri_hit  = if(match(mvjoin(urls,"|"),"(?i)/(MNHST|gate\.php|index\.php\?id=|api/v[0-9]+/get|cmd\.php\?token=|user\.php\?[a-z]+=)"),1,0) 
| eval bitter_ua_hit   = if(match(mvjoin(uas,"|"),"(?i)(ZxxZ|Mozilla/5\.0 \(Windows NT [0-9\.]+; .*\) [A-Z0-9]{6,}-[A-Z0-9]{6,}|MSIE 6\.0; Windows NT 5\.1\)$)"),1,0) 
| eval newdomain_hit   = if(match(site,"\.(xyz|info|live|cyou|top|icu)$") OR match(site,"^[a-z0-9]{6,12}-(news|mail|update|login|gov|mfa)\.(com|net|org)$"),1,0) 
| eval beacon_hit      = if(beacons >= 5 AND uniq_urls <= 2,1,0) 
| eval bitter_score = bitter_uri_hit + bitter_ua_hit + newdomain_hit + beacon_hit 
| where bitter_score >= 2 
| table firstTime src dest site urls uas beacons uniq_urls bitter_score 
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)`
ucs.kql:
let window = 1d;
let bitterUriRegex = @"(?i)/(MNHST|gate\.php|index\.php\?id=|api/v[0-9]+/get|cmd\.php\?token=|user\.php\?[a-z]+=)";
let bitterUaRegex  = @"(?i)ZxxZ|MSIE 6\.0; Windows NT 5\.1\)$|Mozilla/5\.0 \(Windows NT [0-9\.]+;.*\)\s+[A-Z0-9]{6,}-[A-Z0-9]{6,}";
let suspiciousTld   = dynamic([".xyz",".info",".live",".cyou",".top",".icu"]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(window)
| where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","HttpConnectionInspected")
| where RemotePort in (80, 443, 8080, 8443)
| extend Url = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).Uri), Ua = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).UserAgent), Host = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).Host)
| extend uriHit = iff(Url matches regex bitterUriRegex, 1, 0),
         uaHit  = iff(Ua  matches regex bitterUaRegex,  1, 0),
         tldHit = iff(Host has_any (suspiciousTld), 1, 0)
| summarize beacons=count(), distinctUris=dcount(Url), firstSeen=min(Timestamp), lastSeen=max(Timestamp), urls=make_set(Url,10), uas=make_set(Ua,5), maxUriHit=max(uriHit), maxUaHit=max(uaHit), maxTldHit=max(tldHit) by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath, RemoteIP, Host
| extend beaconHit = iff(beacons >= 5 and distinctUris <= 2, 1, 0)
| extend bitterScore = maxUriHit + maxUaHit + maxTldHit + beaconHit
| where bitterScore >= 2
| where InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Public\", @"\Temp\")
   or maxUriHit == 1 or maxUaHit == 1
| project firstSeen, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath, RemoteIP, Host, urls, uas, beacons, bitterScore
| order by bitterScore desc, beacons desc
ucs.rationale: ZxxZ (the BITTER backdoor first published by Cisco Talos in May 2022) uses a hardcoded UA pattern that embeds a victim-ID delimited by a hyphen, and ORPCBackdoor / BitterRAT consistently beacon to short-life .xyz/.info/.live domains registered weeks before campaigns against Pakistani, Bangladeshi and Chinese government infrastructure. Scoring on URI fingerprint + UA fingerprint + new-TLD parking +
